The Engineer

[Your Name]

Software Engineer & Creator of mbiX

The mind behind mbiX — an Excel Intelligence Platform that transforms how teams work with data inside Microsoft Excel.

C# / .NET VSTO Excel Interop SQLite ETL Pipelines Google Sheets API COM Interop UI/UX Design
GitHub LinkedIn Email
The Story

Why mbiX?

Every data team faces the same problem: critical business data lives in Google Sheets, but the real work happens in Excel.

mbiX was born from this frustration. Instead of building yet another cloud tool, I built the solution where the work actually happens.

2023
First prototype — basic sync from Google Sheets to Excel
2024
Full ETL pipeline with validation, schema rules, and PipelineLogger
2025
Dynamic Ribbon, RSA licensing, Export Engine, and public release
mbiX
